Um, no worries, but, uh, yeah, I'm happy to hit up our network and see if we can help.
Um, but in the interim, you know, if there's anything that makes sense to dig in deeper, you know, let me know.
Uh, I don't want to.
Yeah.
I mean, so it's, I, I want to work with you guys.
And so like, like, let's just assume there's going to be a future where we work together and I, I think, sorry, I think the, um, and we'll just figure out the details as, as we go along.
Um, the fact that it's the, the, that the example was, actually awesome.
really glad you brought that up.
Cause I, I, I, I, I was.

Doing this, like, purely from an editorial perspective, and so, like, actually, one thing that would be really useful, I see you're recording with Fathom, I don't know if you have Fathom set up to automatically send the video, but if you, if, oh, yeah, okay, it'll automatically send to me, that's fine, because there's a couple clips from this that I'd love to share with my co-founder, and maybe, maybe rethink the way we're approaching our current, like, workflow library, because if we could free up, we have, like, an engineer working on that, and if we could free up the engineer to focus more on product, that'd be interesting.

Anyway, let me, like, yeah, so, so I'll, I'll sync up with my co-founder, maybe, maybe we can move the timeline up a little bit, now, I don't know if there's other kinds of content we could work on, but, yeah, just give me, like, a week, and, and I'll, I'll, we'll, like, follow up soon.

Yeah, yeah, sounds like a plan, and if there's any, like, additional depth you want me to go into, I can always, like, record a loom if you guys have specific questions, that's, like, a follow-up to this, but I'll make sure you have the,

Yeah, I suspect next time we catch up, getting into specifics on what it would actually look like to work together and what things look like on your side and all that would be interesting to learn about.
Sounds like a plan.
All right, well, appreciate your time, Steve.
Great catching on.
See you,

default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss potential partnership between Logic and GrowthX.ai, exploring content strategies and growth opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Logic is currently focused on an outreach campaign and hiring a head of growth](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=18.0)
  - [GrowthX.ai offers flexible content creation services, from editorial to programmatic, tailored to company needs](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Potential alignment between Logic's workflow library project and GrowthX.ai's programmatic content capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=111.0)
  - [Steve expressed interest in working with GrowthX.ai, will discuss internally and follow up within a week](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2077.0)

## Topics

### Logic's Current Focus and Hiring

  - [Outreach campaign launching in August, targeting 1,500 organizations](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=84.0)
  - [Hiring for head of growth role (80 days open, 5-6 serious candidates)](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Seeking a non-technical generalist comfortable with various marketing disciplines](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
  - [Looking for candidates with zero-to-one experience, preferably from technical product companies](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=162.0)

### GrowthX.ai's Content Creation Services

  - [Offers both editorial and programmatic content creation](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=56.0)
  - [Editorial content ranges from 5-15 pieces per week (9k-15k+ per month)](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=678.0)
  - [Programmatic content involves template-based pages for scalable opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=719.0)
  - [Initial "sprint phase" (20k) to define strategy and scope before execution](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1003.0)
  - [Flexible pricing based on content volume and complexity](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=940.0)

### Programmatic Content Examples

  - [Vappy.ai: Created custom agents for various use cases, showing product capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=800.0)
  - [Ramp: Developed per diem calculators for different cities/states](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=734.0)
  - [Focus on unique user experiences that provide value beyond conventional website structures](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1247.0)

### Content Distribution and Audience Building

  - [Primary focus on organic growth, but can advise on paid strategies](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1668.0)
  - [Emphasis on repurposing content across multiple channels (e.g., video, articles, social media)](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1828.0)
  - [Strategies for bundling content into "kits" for promotion across various platforms](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)

### Potential Collaboration Areas

  - [Steve showed interest in GrowthX.ai's programmatic content capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2032.0)
  - [Possible alignment with Logic's current workflow library project](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1119.0)
  - [Opportunity to free up engineering resources by leveraging GrowthX.ai's services](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2077.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Steve to discuss internally with co-founder and reconsider timeline](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2077.0)
  - [Follow-up meeting to be scheduled within a week](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2077.0)
  - [Next discussion to focus on specifics of potential collaboration and GrowthX.ai's processes](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2101.0)
  - [Kyle to ensure Steve receives the recording of this meeting](https://fathom.video/share/D3aGq8m3wUDYyRdsrxUEgHXVDQ_mMsvZ?tab=summary&timestamp=2092.0)

action_items.description: Share JD link with Kyle for potential candidate referrals
Share Logic's JD with network, look for potential head of growth candidates
Ensure Fathom recording of meeting sent to Steve
Sync w/ co-founder re: potentially expediting GrowthX engagement timeline
Prepare specific Qs re: GrowthX engagement details for next meeting
